detail.subtitle: Prompt details
detail.deleteDescription: This action permanently deletes the prompt.
detail.label: Label
detail.attachmentsHelper: Attached file contents are shown below.
detail.failedHelper: An error occurred while processing the prompt. You can try resyncing from the batch detail page.
detail.draftEditableHint: This prompt can be edited or deleted now because it belongs to a draft batch.

edit.description: Review the batch context, confirm what changed, and save with clear downstream impact.
edit.notAllowed: Not allowed to edit in this status.
edit.formDescription: Adjust the draft prompt while keeping save impact and runtime context visible.
edit.blockedDescription: This screen only opens for prompts that belong to a draft batch.
edit.blockedHelp: Open the prompt detail page to review the latest state before trying again.
edit.blockedPromptMissing: The target prompt could not be found, so the edit form cannot be opened.
edit.blockedBatchStatus: This prompt belongs to a batch in {{status}} status. Only draft batches can be edited.
edit.fetchErrorTitle: We couldn't load the edit screen
edit.fetchErrorDescription: The prompt or batch context could not be loaded completely.
edit.fetchErrorHelp: Try loading this screen again. If the problem persists, return to the previous page and verify the latest batch state.
edit.recreateNoticeDescription: Saving with attachment changes will create a replacement prompt and remove the current one after the new prompt is created.
edit.actionBarRecreate: Saving will replace this prompt because attachments changed.

summary.title: Change Summary
summary.description: Keep the save decision visible while editing.
summary.promptTypeDescription: The save payload follows the currently selected prompt type.
summary.attachmentChangedDescription: Attachment content differs from the original prompt and will affect the save flow.
summary.attachmentUnchangedDescription: Attachments still match the original prompt.
summary.referenceConfiguredDescription: Reference media is available for the current edit-type prompt.
summary.referenceMissingDescription: Reference media is required for edit-type prompts. Add it before saving.
summary.referenceNotRequiredDescription: Reference media is only used for edit-type prompts.
summary.saveReadyDescription: Required input is complete and the save request can be sent now.
summary.saveNeedsPrompt: Add user prompt content before saving.
summary.savePendingAttachments: Wait for attachment processing to finish before saving.
summary.saveNeedsReferenceMedia: Reference media is required to save this edit-type prompt.
summary.saveUpdating: A save request is already in progress.

attachments.label: Attachments
attachments.helper: Click or drag and drop files to attach them.
attachments.selectOrDrop: Select files or drag and drop

errors.unsupportedExtension: Unsupported file extension: {{fileName}}. Only {{types}} files are allowed.
errors.processFailed: Failed to process the selected files.
